changeSet.author: codex
changeSet.comment: Add TRACK_IDS as an optional generic filter parameter. The value is a comma/semicolon/whitespace-separated string carried through existing stringParams and intersected by SmartBaseFilter.

update.column: SELECT id, activity_type AS grp FROM gps_track gt WHERE 1 = 1 -- OPTIONAL DATE_FROM and DATE_TO params. If NULL, they won't be applied as COALESCE uses start_date as fallback. AND gt.start_date >= COALESCE(TO_TIMESTAMP(:DATE_TIME_FROM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), gt.start_date) AND gt.start_date <= COALESCE(TO_TIMESTAMP(:DATE_TIME_TO, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), gt.start_date) AND gt.start_date >= '1971-01-01' AND gt.duplicate_status = 'UNIQUE' AND gt.load_status = 'SUCCESS' -- Planner: exclude planned routes (ideas) — they are never "done" tracks. AND gt.track_source = 'IMPORTED' -- OPTIONAL TRACK_IDS: comma/semicolon/whitespace-separated track IDs. Blank means all tracks in scope. AND ( NULLIF(BTRIM(:TRACK_IDS), '') IS NULL OR gt.id = ANY ( ARRAY( SELECT token::bigint FROM regexp_split_to_table(:TRACK_IDS, '[,;[:space:]]+') AS token WHERE token ~ '^[0-9]+$' ) ) ) -- OPTIONAL GEO CIRCLE: if GEO_CIRCLE_1_POINT is NULL, condition is skipped AND ( :GEO_CIRCLE_1_POINT IS NULL OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM gps_track_data gtd WHERE gtd.gps_track_id = gt.id AND gtd.precision_in_meter = 1000 AND gtd.track_type = 'SIMPLIFIED_SHAPE' AND ST_DWithin( gtd.track::geography, ST_GeographyFromText(:GEO_CIRCLE_1_POINT), CAST(:GEO_CIRCLE_1_RADIUS AS float8) ) ) ) -- OPTIONAL GEO RECTANGLE: if GEO_RECTANGLE_1_MIN_LAT is NULL, condition is skipped AND ( :GEO_RECTANGLE_1_MIN_LAT IS NULL OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM gps_track_data gtd WHERE gtd.gps_track_id = gt.id AND gtd.precision_in_meter = 1000 AND gtd.track_type = 'SIMPLIFIED_SHAPE' AND ST_Intersects( gtd.track, ST_MakeEnvelope( CAST(:GEO_RECTANGLE_1_MIN_LNG AS float8), CAST(:GEO_RECTANGLE_1_MIN_LAT AS float8), CAST(:GEO_RECTANGLE_1_MAX_LNG AS float8), CAST(:GEO_RECTANGLE_1_MAX_LAT AS float8), 4326 ) ) ) ) -- OPTIONAL GEO POLYGON: if GEO_POLYGON_1 is NULL, condition is skipped AND ( :GEO_POLYGON_1 IS NULL OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM gps_track_data gtd WHERE gtd.gps_track_id = gt.id AND gtd.precision_in_meter = 1000 AND gtd.track_type = 'SIMPLIFIED_SHAPE' AND ST_Intersects( gtd.track, ST_GeomFromText(:GEO_POLYGON_1, 4326) ) ) ) ORDER BY start_date
